desiredFields.description:
Sit taller at your desk — without nagging yourself.

Posture Pause sends calm, reliable reminders during your work hours so you can straighten up, breathe, and get back to focus. No accounts. No tracking. No always-on sensors draining your battery.

Built for real workdays
• Choose your interval (from quick check-ins to longer deep-work blocks)
• Set work hours and weekdays — reminders only fire when you’re actually at your desk
• One tap: “I fixed it,” snooze 5 minutes, or skip

Stay consistent
• See today’s corrections at a glance
• Build a streak that rewards showing up
• Review a simple 7-day view of your week

Privacy-first by design
Everything stays on your device. We don’t require an account and we don’t sell your attention to analytics platforms.

Optional Premium
Unlock every interval, streaks & history detail, a short stretch library, calm themes, and a custom reminder message. Try yearly with a 7-day free trial, go monthly, or unlock lifetime.

Posture Pause is a gentle habit companion — not a medical device. Listen to your body and consult a professional for pain or injury.
desiredFields.promotionalText: Gentle desk reminders to sit tall — privacy-first, no account required.
desiredFields.whatsNew: Welcome to Posture Pause — calm posture reminders for your workday.
